Home > Coding Assistant > CodeBuddy

CodeBuddy

★★★☆☆ Credits for new users Paid from: Pay-as-you-go API

Visit official site →

Tencent's AI coding assistant, deeply integrated with Tencent Cloud. Supports code completion, chat, and code review. Free for individuals, enterprise plans available.

Free Credits Details

  • Amount: Credits for new users
  • Reset: No reset
  • Watermark: N/A
  • Commercial: Check official terms

Key Features

  • Code Auto-Completion
  • Chat Mode
  • Code Review Suggestions
  • Multi-IDE Support
  • Tencent Cloud Integration
  • Chinese Coding Optimization

Pros

  • Tencent Cloud ecosystem
  • Free credits for new users
  • Good Chinese support

Cons

  • Features still improving
  • Limited IDE support

Tips

  • Best for Tencent Cloud users
  • Use new user credits quickly
